name: fsharp-pure-decorations
description: Shows pure/impure badges for FSharp.PureAnalyzer diagnostics (PURE002 / PURE003).

fsharpPureDecorations.enabled.description: Show pure/impure badges for PureAnalyzer diagnostics.

fsharpPureDecorations.impureColor.description: Accent color for the impure badge (orange by default).

fsharpPureDecorations.pureColor.description: Accent color for the pure badge (green by default).
